Three things it does relentlessly.

What you're paying attention to — and what you're not
  • 01

    Two-minute invoices

    Pull a saved client and reusable line items, and a clean, branded invoice is ready to send. Export a PDF or share a pay link — your client settles it in a click, no login, no back-and-forth.

  • 02

    Automatic follow-ups

    Set a reminder cadence once and Facturio nudges overdue clients on schedule — politely, in your name. You stop being the debt collector and keep the working relationship intact.

  • 03

    See what you're owed

    One live ledger sorts every invoice into draft, sent, overdue and paid, with the real total you're owed pinned at the top. Cash flow stops being a guess you make at month's end.

Priced like a freelancer thinks.

Two plans / cancel anytime

SoloPlan A

€0/ forever

  • Up to 3 active clients
  • Unlimited invoices & PDFs
  • One pay link per invoice
Start on Solo

ProPlan B — popular

€9/ month

  • Unlimited clients & invoices
  • Automatic follow-ups & reminders
  • Live owed-to-you ledger & exports
Start 14-day trial →

Facturio turns a line-item quote into a paid invoice in under a minute — with automatic reminders, built-in payment links, and a paper trail your accountant will actually thank you for.

Why freelancers switch

Three things Facturio does better than a spreadsheet.

01

Invoices in under a minute

Saved clients, line-item templates and automatic numbering — quote to invoice without re-typing a single amount.

02

Get paid faster

Card and bank transfer are built into every invoice link, with automatic reminders that go out before — not after — the due date.

03

Taxes sorted, not scrambled

Quarterly summaries and tagged expenses export clean, so handing your accountant a folder in April is a formality, not a fire drill.

Facturio

Issued to: freelancers, everywhere

Re:

Getting paid shouldn’t be homework.

Facturio turns a quote into an invoice, an invoice into paid, and paid into a line you never think about again — built for the billable rhythm of freelance work, not for a finance department.

Start free

Line items

  • 01

    Invoices in under a minute

    Pick a client, drop in the hours, send. Facturio carries over tax lines, currency and terms from the last job you billed them, so the second invoice is faster than the first.

    Core
  • 02

    Reminders that don’t sound like a bailiff

    Automatic nudges at 3, 7 and 14 days overdue, worded like you’d actually write them. Every reminder is a draft you approve before it goes out — never a surprise to the client.

    Automation
  • 03

    One ledger, every client

    Paid, pending and overdue sorted into a single running statement across every client you bill, exportable the moment your accountant asks — no spreadsheet reconstruction required.

    Reporting

Statement of account
